rationale: The cited paper centers on mind-set metrics including advertising awareness and consideration-set inclusion in market response, while the citing paper’s core contribution is to incorporate brand-awareness/choice-set data into demand and separate advertising’s awareness versus utility effects. This direct construct-level overlap (awareness, consideration sets, advertising-to-sales mechanisms) makes the citation plausibly foundational/mechanism-relevant rather than an obvious incidental mention, so it should be retained for full relation judgment.
